narrative:
PRECINCT DeGRAFF (precinct in Logan County) has 828 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.2 percentage points.
